infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PathSense AI needs camera access to detect obstacles and provide navigation assistance.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PathSense AI needs microphone access for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PathSense AI needs location access to provide navigation assistance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PathSense AI needs location access to provide continuous navigation assistance.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: PathSense AI needs motion data to improve navigation accuracy.
